asyncssh>=2.21.1
# ansible-core support is tied to Python runtime version.
# Python 3.9 is EOL (Oct 2025) and ansible-core 2.15.x has no patch for CVE-2024-11079.
ansible-core>=2.16.14,<2.18; python_version >= "3.10" and python_version < "3.11"
ansible-core>=2.18.8; python_version >= "3.11"
jxmlease>=1.0.3
junos-eznc>=2.7.4
xmltodict>=0.13.0
